char.name: Lamech
char.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.

friends.name: Adah
friends.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Jabal and Jubal.

friends.name: Zillah
friends.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Tubal-Cain and Naamah.

friends.name: Ham
friends.bio: Pitching the inside and outside of the ark.

friends.name: Naveh
friends.bio: Granary-keeper in Enoch. So the old shipwright is STILL building that monster boat on dry land, still hollering about a 'flood.' 🙄 It has never once rained like that. Some people will believe anything. Anyway, harvest was good, come buy grain.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.

friends.name: Methuselah
friends.bio: Seen many years. Grandfather to Noah. The days are getting darker, but family stays strong.

friends.name: Japheth
friends.bio: Gathering food for the animals. So many animals.

friends.name: Jubal
friends.bio: Inventing new ways to make music. Playing the lyre and pipe.

posts.author: CHAR_018
posts.body: Adah. Zillah. My wives, hear me, listen to what I say. I have killed a man for wounding me, a young man merely for striking me. If Cain is avenged seven times over, then Lamech is avenged seventy-seven. Let any man alive think very hard before he raises a hand against me.
posts.format: the boast (Gen 4:23-24): violence compounding down Cain's line

comments.author: CHAR_020
comments.body: You don't have to say these things out loud, Lamech. The boys are listening to every word.

author_info.name: Zillah
author_info.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Tubal-Cain and Naamah.

comments.author: OUTLET_watchman
comments.body: Cain killed and hid his face. His descendant kills and writes a song about it. The line runs downhill. 👁️

author_info.name: Lamech
author_info.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.
